name: French Fry Spam Casserole
recipeIngredient: 32 ounces frozen french fried potatoes, thawed
10 3/4 ounces low-fat cream of mushroom soup
12 ounces Spam® Lite luncheon meat, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9 inches pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine potatoes, cheese, sour cream, soup, luncheon meat, bell peppers, and onions. Mix well.
4. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Sprinkle bread crumbs over the top.
6. Bake for 40 minutes, or until heated through.
